implemented_core_mechanics: 12 named frontier regions with escalating threat and world size
world map deployment and safehouse return flow
safehouse workshop infirmary and garage upgrades
macro resources for scrap fuel medicine and survivors
weapon switching across pistol shotgun SMG rifle and crossbow
clip ammo reserve ammo reload timing and weapon noise rules
molotov burn zones and noise lure utility system
zombie roster with shambler runner crawler bloater armored and howler variants
rescue survivor escort relay secure and extraction objective loop
bike mode traversal with fuel pressure and weapon restriction
menu help HUD pause result world map and safehouse overlays
tracked gameplay art pack assignment with integrated runtime art map
tracked BGM and SFX assignment through the shared audio library
animation_and_facing_evidence: GameView rotates the player sprite from the aim vector and swaps stand gun machine and reload poses by weapon state
GameView rotates zombie sprites from velocity and varies tint scale and special behavior by infected type
GameView draws runtime bike, burn zone, lure pulse, pickup, and hp bar feedback instead of leaving static placeholders
GameView loads assigned gameplay art assets through AssetManager and BitmapFactory
known_limitations: The first playable scope represents each frontier region as one large mission space instead of the full later plan for multiple subzones per region.

The broader draft roster for revolver burst rifle flamethrower grenade launcher pipe bomb and flash flare is partially deferred, while the implemented weapon set already preserves the required weapon-switching survival shooter identity.
remaining_quality_notes: The current implementation preserves the confirmed large-map zombie frontier scavenging loop instead of collapsing into a small arena wave template.
Future expansion can deepen route variation, landmark diversity, and the late-game weapon roster without replacing the current core.
